title: Chicken Jockey
description: Inspired by 'A Minecraft Movie', this mod makes baby zombies seek out nearby chickens so they can become jockeys.
body: ![downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fconnorcode.com%2Fapi%2Fdownloads%3Fmodrinth%3DeVxoMKrN%26curseforge%3D1239940&query=%24%5B%27total-human%27%5D&label=downloads&style=for-the-badge&color=0dc362) **THIS MOD WAS FEATURED ON [GAMESRADAR](https://www.gamesradar.com/games/adventure/as-the-minecraft-movies-infamous-chicken-jockey-scene-continues-going-viral-creative-fans-are-basking-in-the-chaos-with-film-accurate-skins-and-silly-mods/)** **Requires [Jockey API](https://modrinth.com/mod/jockey-api)** Inspired by 'A Minecraft Movie', this mod makes baby zombies seek out nearby chickens so they can become jockeys. Zombies, zombie villagers, husks, and zombie piglins are all supported! Will drop the 'Lava Chicken' disc on defeat (1.21.8+). ## Other Jockey Mods - [Bedrock Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrock-jockey) - [Dolphin Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/dolphin-jockey) - [Spider Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/spider-jockey) ## NEED A SERVER?
